title: Spicy Dense Russian Potato Stir-fry
description: This paleo-friendly and spicy dish is perfect for those who need a hearty meal during their sick day. It's packed with creme fraiche to make it creamy and dense.

ingredients.name: dill
ingredients.amount: 1 tablespoon chopped fresh or 1 teaspoon dried

instructions: Peel and cut the potatoes into thin slices.

Place the sliced potatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, sprinkle them with ginger, red pepper flakes, salt, and freshly ground black pepper. Toss everything together until evenly coated.
Roast in preheated oven for about 20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy around the edges.
While the potatoes are roasting, in a skillet over medium heat, add minced garlic, followed by cream cheese (creme fraiche). Stir continuously to prevent burning.

After the potatoes have roasted for 10 minutes, remove them from the oven and place half of them back on the baking sheet. Add the remaining garlic-cream mixture over the top of each potato slice, ensuring they are evenly coated.
Sprinkle dill over the hot garlic-cheese mixture.
Return to the oven and bake for another 5-7 minutes or until the cheese starts to bubble and turn golden brown.
